automation.title: Automation
automation.regenerateAllConfirm: Regenerate every spec? This overwrites all generated specs, including any manual edits.
automation.regenBlocked: Regeneration is still blocked by the quality gate.
automation.regenBlockedDescChanged: See the highlighted changes below. To unblock, refresh the project Knowledge Base, then regenerate.
automation.regenBlockedDescUnchanged: It still used placeholders/ungrounded references. Refresh the project Knowledge Base, then regenerate.
automation.resolveRepoFailed: Couldn't resolve the project/repository for this case.

chat.emptyState: Ask Q-Agent to edit this spec — e.g. “use data-testid selectors” or “assert the success toast”.
chat.placeholder: Ask Q-Agent to edit this spec… (@ to reference a spec)

run.label: Run
run.title: Run only this spec
run.titleBlocked: Run anyway — this spec is blocked and will likely fail until unblocked
run.titleProductDefect: Product defect — routed to report, not re-run

heal.label: Self-heal
heal.title: Run this spec; if it fails, let Claude fix it from the error and retry
heal.titleBlocked: Self-heal — run it and let Claude try to fix/unblock it (fixes are still gated, so a missing-Knowledge-Base block needs a KB refresh)
heal.titleProductDefect: Product defect is terminal — self-heal disabled

explore.label: Explore to unblock
explore.title: Drive a real browser to discover the missing routes/selectors and write them to the Knowledge Base, then regenerate to unblock

chat.label: Edit with Q-Agent
chat.title: Edit this spec with Q-Agent (AI chat)

empty.title: Not generated yet
empty.hint: This spec hasn't been authored yet. Use Regenerate to generate it.

footer.description: Execute the approved suite in parallel across the Run

empty.title: No automation yet
empty.readyOne: {{count}} approved case ready to automate. Generate Playwright specs from them.
empty.readyOther: {{count}} approved cases ready to automate. Generate Playwright specs from them.
empty.none: No approved, automatable cases in this run. Approve non-Manual test cases in the Review Center, then generate automation here.

repo.title: Target repositories
repo.description: Automation reads each work item's repository knowledge base. Claude guessed a default — override per item if needed.

productDefect.title: Product defect
productDefect.body: This case surfaced a product defect — it is routed to the report rather than re-run. Regeneration and self-heal are disabled.

blocked.title: Spec is blocked
blocked.defaultReason: This spec is blocked and cannot run. Resolve the underlying issue first.
blocked.exploreTitle: Drive a real browser to discover the missing routes/selectors and write them to the Knowledge Base, then regenerate
blocked.hint: Explore the live app to discover selectors, or re-run project bootstrap, then regenerate.

gateRejected.text: Last regeneration rejected (kept previous good spec)

banner.title: Exploring the live app to unblock
banner.subtitle: Driving a real browser to discover routes & selectors

review.title: Exploration results
review.wroteKbHint: Runtime-verified routes/selectors were written to the Knowledge Base — regenerate to unblock.
review.noKbHint: No usable page state was observed, so nothing was written to the Knowledge Base — the case stays blocked. Check the app is reachable in this environment, then try again.

regenNote.triggerTitle: Regenerate this spec, optionally with a note steering Claude

events.productDefect: {{caseCode}}: product defect suspected — routed to the report

target.changeTooltip: Change the default execution target in Settings

auth.localAgent: A browser opened on your machine. Log in
auth.server: A browser has opened on the host machine. Log in
auth.thenClose: , then close the window to continue.

queue.heading: EXECUTION QUEUE
queue.empty: No cases queued yet. Run the suite to begin execution.

toast.noLocalAgent: No local agent paired — start your local agent

evidence.title: Evidence
evidence.subtitle: RUN-{{runId}} · evidence per test case, grouped by ticket
evidence.uploading: Uploading evidence from the local agent… artifacts will appear here shortly.

empty.title: No evidence yet
empty.body: Run the approved suite to capture evidence for every ticket in the Run.

evidence.noTestCases: No test cases in this ticket.

screenshot.passedBody: No screenshot was captured for this case.
screenshot.noShotBody: This case has no failure screenshot to annotate.

evidence.noTrace: No trace file recorded for this case.

header.subtitle: publish results to each work item
header.title: Ticket Comments

empty.title: No comments prepared
empty.body: Generate a report, then prepare AI-summarized result comments for each ticket in the run.

header.subtitle: create approved cases in the provider & link to each work item
header.title: Create & Link Test Cases

idle.title: Ready to create test cases
idle.descLocal: Local mode is on — approved cases are recorded locally only. Nothing is written to the provider.
idle.descProvider: Approved cases will be created in the provider and linked to each work item before automation is generated.
idle.localToggle: Local mode — don't create in the provider (avoid test-item clutter)

running.title: Synchronizing with the provider
running.subtitle: Creating and linking approved test cases…

done.descLocal: Approved test cases were recorded locally (provider untouched). You can now generate automation.
done.descProvider: Approved test cases are created and linked. You can now generate automation.
